context: Tests whether NaturalLanguage text analysis guidance uses current APIs and avoids common support and threading mistakes.

checklist.name: Tokenization
checklist.description: Uses NLTokenizer with the correct token unit and assigns the analyzed string before token enumeration.

checklist.name: Thread safety
checklist.description: States that NLTokenizer and NLTagger instances should be confined to one thread or dispatch queue at a time, or recreated per concurrent task.

checklist.name: Language recognition
checklist.description: Uses NLLanguageRecognizer and recommends languageConstraints or languageHints for short text or known language sets.

checklist.name: Tagging schemes
checklist.description: Uses NLTagger with appropriate schemes such as .nameType and .sentimentScore and options such as .omitWhitespace, .omitPunctuation, and .joinNames.

checklist.name: Optional results
checklist.description: Treats sentiment, tags, available tag schemes, and unsupported languages as fallible instead of force-unwrapping or assuming results always exist.

checklist.name: Embedding availability
checklist.description: Checks NLEmbedding word or sentence embedding availability and does not assume embeddings exist for every language.

checklist.name: No sibling overreach
checklist.description: Does not route the answer into OCR, speech transcription, UI localization, or generative model implementation.
